name: Spicy Onion Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and mustard in a bowl. Mix until a smooth paste forms.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a large, non-corrosive pan, combine vinegar, wine, chopped onion, crushed garlic, crumbled bay leaf, honey, Tabasco sauce, tarragon, and allspice.
4. Boil the mixture rapidly until it reduces by half.
5. Stir frequently during reduction.
6. Strain the reduced liquid into a double boiler.
7. Stir in the mustard paste.
8. Cook over simmering water until thickened, about 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
10. Cover and store in the refrigerator.
11. Stir before using.
